subcategory: 3D rotating cube loader with cycling status text
use_cases: Display loading state during data fetching operations
Show processing feedback during async workflows
Indicate status changes with animated cube and text transitions
Provide visual feedback during sync or update processes
Enhance user experience during background operations
ai_summary: A dynamic 3D cube loader component featuring CSS 3D transforms with continuous rotation and cycling status text that updates every 600ms. The cube displays different status messages like 'Fetching', 'Fixing', and 'Updating' with dynamically colored faces. Fully customizable through props for size, rotation speed, and text size, making it suitable for various loading scenarios across web applications.
